questionText: Durante uma apresentação sobre reciclagem, você quer fazer uma sugestão amigável sobre como melhorar o programa atual. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It might be worth considering the implementation of a composting system to complement our existing recycling efforts.
options: You should definitely recycle more things.
It might be worth considering the implementation of a composting system to complement our existing recycling efforts.
Recycling is really important, so do it.
I think we need to recycle everything now.

questionText: Você deseja expressar discordância educada com a opinião de um colega sobre mudanças climáticas em uma reunião profissional. Como procede?
correctAnswer: While I appreciate your perspective, the scientific evidence predominantly suggests a different conclusion.
options: You're completely wrong about climate change.
While I appreciate your perspective, the scientific evidence predominantly suggests a different conclusion.
That's not true at all.
Climate change is definitely real, so your opinion is incorrect.

questionText: Em uma conferência sobre sustentabilidade, você quer pedir esclarecimento sobre uma afirmação feita pelo palestrante. Qual é a forma mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Could you perhaps elaborate on the correlation between industrial emissions and ocean acidification that you mentioned?
options: I don't understand what you said about the ocean.
Could you perhaps elaborate on the correlation between industrial emissions and ocean acidification that you mentioned?
What did you mean exactly?
That part was confusing to me.

questionText: Você precisa expressar preocupação genuína sobre os impactos da poluição plástica durante uma entrevista de trabalho. Como articula isso?
correctAnswer: I am genuinely concerned about the exponential increase in plastic accumulation in our oceans and its ramifications for marine ecosystems.
options: Plastic pollution is really bad for the ocean.
I am genuinely concerned about the exponential increase in plastic accumulation in our oceans and its ramifications for marine ecosystems.
There's too much plastic in the sea.
Plastic pollution makes me sad.

questionText: Ao negociar um contrato ambiental, você quer concordar parcialmente com os termos propostos. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: While the provisions regarding carbon offset mechanisms are commendable, I would advocate for more stringent requirements.
options: The carbon offset part is okay, but we need stricter rules.
While the provisions regarding carbon offset mechanisms are commendable, I would advocate for more stringent requirements.
Some parts are good, other parts are not.
I agree with most of it but want changes too.

questionText: Você quer enfatizar a urgência de ação climática sem ser alarmista demais durante uma apresentação corporativa. Como faz isso?
correctAnswer: The imperative to transition towards renewable energy sources is becoming increasingly compelling given the trajectory of global emissions.
options: The world will end if we don't stop pollution right now.
The imperative to transition towards renewable energy sources is becoming increasingly compelling given the trajectory of global emissions.
We really need to do something about climate change soon.
Global warming is going to kill everyone.

questionText: Durante uma discussão sobre políticas ambientais, você deseja oferecer uma alternativa bem fundamentada. Qual expressão se encaixa melhor?
correctAnswer: An alternative approach would be to implement a tiered incentive system that rewards enterprises demonstrating measurable reductions in their carbon footprint.
options: Maybe we could do something different.
An alternative approach would be to implement a tiered incentive system that rewards enterprises demonstrating measurable reductions in their carbon footprint.
What if companies just tried harder?
We could change the way we do this.

questionText: Você precisa reconhecer o mérito de um argumento ambiental enquanto mantém sua posição crítica. Como expressa isso?
correctAnswer: I acknowledge the merits of your argument regarding biodiversity conservation; nevertheless, the economic implications warrant further scrutiny.
options: You're right about some things, but I still disagree.
I acknowledge the merits of your argument regarding biodiversity conservation; nevertheless, the economic implications warrant further scrutiny.
That's a good point, but there are other issues.
I see what you mean, but I don't agree.

questionText: Em uma conferência ambiental, você quer fazer uma pergunta profunda que demonstre pensamento crítico. O que pergunta?
correctAnswer: To what extent do you believe current mitigation strategies adequately address the systemic nature of environmental degradation?
options: Do you think we're doing enough?
To what extent do you believe current mitigation strategies adequately address the systemic nature of environmental degradation?
Is climate change real?
What's your opinion about pollution?

questionText: Você quer propor uma solução ambiental inovadora mantendo um tom profissional e confiante. Como se expressa?
correctAnswer: I would posit that implementing blockchain technology for environmental impact tracking could substantially enhance transparency and accountability.
options: Maybe we could use blockchain for environmental stuff.
I would posit that implementing blockchain technology for environmental impact tracking could substantially enhance transparency and accountability.
Blockchain might help with the environment.
What about using new technology for environmental tracking?

questionText: Durante uma negociação sobre políticas de sustentabilidade, você quer expressar discordância fundamentada. Como faz?
correctAnswer: While I recognize the laudable intentions behind this proposal, the empirical evidence suggests it may not yield the anticipated environmental outcomes.
options: I don't think this will work.
While I recognize the laudable intentions behind this proposal, the empirical evidence suggests it may not yield the anticipated environmental outcomes.
This plan probably won't help the environment.
I disagree with your idea.

questionText: Você deseja expressar expertise em questões climáticas de forma subtil e confiante. O que diz?
correctAnswer: Having extensively examined the literature on climate dynamics, I can affirm that the correlation between atmospheric CO2 levels and global temperature rise is unequivocal.
options: I know a lot about climate change.
Having extensively examined the literature on climate dynamics, I can affirm that the correlation between atmospheric CO2 levels and global temperature rise is unequivocal.
Climate change is something I understand well.
I've read about global warming quite a bit.

questionText: Em uma discussão sobre responsabilidade corporativa ambiental, você quer recomendar uma ação específica. Como procede?
correctAnswer: I would strongly recommend implementing a comprehensive life cycle assessment to identify and mitigate environmental impacts throughout your supply chain.
options: You should check how bad your company is for the environment.
I would strongly recommend implementing a comprehensive life cycle assessment to identify and mitigate environmental impacts throughout your supply chain.
Do an assessment of your environmental problems.
You need to figure out how much damage you're doing.

questionText: Durante um debate sobre energias renováveis, você deseja questionar uma premissa subjacente de forma respeitosa. Como aborda?
correctAnswer: May I respectfully challenge the underlying assumption that renewable energy adoption can singularly address our current energy crisis?
options: I don't think you're right about renewable energy.
May I respectfully challenge the underlying assumption that renewable energy adoption can singularly address our current energy crisis?
Is renewable energy really the solution?
You're wrong about how renewable energy works.

questionText: Você quer elogiar uma iniciativa ambiental enquanto sugere melhorias subtis. O que diz?
correctAnswer: Your environmental initiative demonstrates commendable vision; however, incorporating adaptive management strategies could enhance its long-term efficacy.
options: That's a good project, but you could do better.
Your environmental initiative demonstrates commendable vision; however, incorporating adaptive management strategies could enhance its long-term efficacy.
This is a nice environmental plan.
I like what you're doing, but change some things.

questionText: Em um seminário sobre conservação, você quer oferecer uma perspectiva baseada em pesquisa. Como se articula?
correctAnswer: Contemporary research suggests that participatory conservation models engender superior outcomes compared to top-down regulatory approaches.
options: People work better when they help with conservation.
Contemporary research suggests that participatory conservation models engender superior outcomes compared to top-down regulatory approaches.
Community involvement in conservation is better.
Studies show that people like helping with conservation.

questionText: Durante uma conversa profissional sobre sustentabilidade, você quer introduzir uma perspectiva diferente tactfully. Como faz?
correctAnswer: It is worth considering whether conventional sustainability metrics adequately capture the multifaceted nature of environmental conservation.
options: Maybe we're measuring sustainability wrong.
It is worth considering whether conventional sustainability metrics adequately capture the multifaceted nature of environmental conservation.
I think how we measure sustainability is not right.
We might need to change how we measure sustainability.

questionText: Você deseja fazer uma crítica construtiva sobre uma política ambiental sem parecer hostil. Qual abordagem é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: While the policy framework demonstrates progressive intent, its implementation mechanisms require substantial refinement to achieve stipulated objectives.
options: This policy won't work as written.
While the policy framework demonstrates progressive intent, its implementation mechanisms require substantial refinement to achieve stipulated objectives.
The policy has some good ideas but bad execution.
I think this policy is not going to work.

questionText: Em uma apresentação sobre biodiversidade, você quer fazer uma afirmação que combine certeza com sofisticação. O que diz?
correctAnswer: It is incontrovertible that anthropogenic activities constitute the primary driver of contemporary biodiversity loss.
options: Humans are definitely causing animals to disappear.
It is incontrovertible that anthropogenic activities constitute the primary driver of contemporary biodiversity loss.
We're destroying biodiversity.
Human activities are killing animals.

questionText: Você quer expressar incerteza sofisticada sobre as soluções climáticas durante um painel de especialistas. Como procede?
correctAnswer: The efficacy of incremental policy adjustments remains equivocal given the magnitude of systemic environmental challenges we face.
options: I'm not sure if these small changes will work.
The efficacy of incremental policy adjustments remains equivocal given the magnitude of systemic environmental challenges we face.
We don't know if these solutions will help.
It's unclear if our plans will work well.

questionText: Numa reunião estratégica sobre pegada de carbono, você quer propor um reexame de metodologias existentes. Como articula?
correctAnswer: I would propound that a comprehensive reassessment of our carbon accounting methodologies is warranted to ensure methodological rigor and comparative validity.
options: Maybe we should check our carbon measurements again.
I would propound that a comprehensive reassessment of our carbon accounting methodologies is warranted to ensure methodological rigor and comparative validity.
Let's look at how we measure carbon again.
Our carbon calculations might need to be redone.

questionText: Durante uma conferência internacional sobre clima, você quer expressar preocupação legítima sem parecer dramático. Como faz?
correctAnswer: The trajectory of current greenhouse gas emissions presents a formidable challenge to the attainment of established climate mitigation targets.
options: We're emitting too many greenhouse gases.
The trajectory of current greenhouse gas emissions presents a formidable challenge to the attainment of established climate mitigation targets.
If we keep emitting this much, we're doomed.
Greenhouse gases are making everything worse.

questionText: Você deseja questionar a adequação de investimentos em energia renovável mantendo tom profissional. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: One might inquire whether the current magnitude of investment in renewable infrastructure is proportionate to the scale of requisite decarbonization.
options: Are we spending enough money on renewable energy?
One might inquire whether the current magnitude of investment in renewable infrastructure is proportionate to the scale of requisite decarbonization.
Is the money we're spending on renewable energy enough?
We should spend more on renewable energy.

questionText: Em discussão sobre justiça ambiental, você quer articular uma preocupação nuançada. Qual opção é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Environmental degradation disproportionately affects economically disadvantaged communities, thereby perpetuating structural inequalities.
options: Poor people suffer more from pollution.
Environmental degradation disproportionately affects economically disadvantaged communities, thereby perpetuating structural inequalities.
Environmental problems hurt poor communities more.
Pollution affects rich and poor people differently.

questionText: Você quer sugerir uma reorientação estratégica em políticas ambientais de forma diplomática. Como procede?
correctAnswer: A paradigm shift towards nature-based solutions might constitute a more efficacious complement to conventional technological interventions.
options: We should focus more on nature.
A paradigm shift towards nature-based solutions might constitute a more efficacious complement to conventional technological interventions.
Natural solutions could help more than technology.
Nature-based approaches are better than technology.

questionText: Durante um debate acadêmico sobre sustentabilidade, você quer contextualizar uma discordância mais ampla. Como faz?
correctAnswer: This particular disagreement reflects deeper epistemological divergences regarding how we conceptualize the relationship between human activity and ecological systems.
options: We disagree on environmental issues.
This particular disagreement reflects deeper epistemological divergences regarding how we conceptualize the relationship between human activity and ecological systems.
Our argument shows we think differently about nature.
We have different views about humans and nature.

questionText: Você quer fazer uma recomendação baseada em evidências sobre mudança organizacional ambiental. Como articula?
correctAnswer: The extant literature unequivocally demonstrates that stakeholder engagement mechanisms substantially augment the likelihood of successful environmental transition initiatives.
options: Talking to people helps environmental changes.
The extant literature unequivocally demonstrates that stakeholder engagement mechanisms substantially augment the likelihood of successful environmental transition initiatives.
If you involve people, environmental changes work better.
Studies show that involving people helps with environmental changes.

questionText: Em um painel sobre economia circular, você deseja introduzir uma limitação importante de forma construtiva. Como faz?
correctAnswer: While circular economy models present considerable promise, their implementation is constrained by infrastructural limitations and incumbent economic incentive structures.
options: Circular economy is hard to do.
While circular economy models present considerable promise, their implementation is constrained by infrastructural limitations and incumbent economic incentive structures.
The system makes circular economy difficult.
We need better infrastructure for circular economy.

questionText: Você deseja expressar consequências potenciais de inação ambiental sem alarmismo. Qual expressão é apropriada?
correctAnswer: Continued inaction on environmental degradation will inevitably precipitate cascading ecological and socioeconomic ramifications of unprecedented magnitude.
options: If we don't act, bad things will happen.
Continued inaction on environmental degradation will inevitably precipitate cascading ecological and socioeconomic ramifications of unprecedented magnitude.
Not doing anything about the environment will cause problems.
The environment will get worse if we do nothing.

questionText: Durante uma discussão sobre regulamentações ambientais, você quer nuançar o equilíbrio entre proteção e desenvolvimento. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: Effective environmental stewardship necessitates orchestrating a judicious equilibrium between conservation imperatives and legitimate economic development aspirations.
options: We need both environmental protection and economic growth.
Effective environmental stewardship necessitates orchestrating a judicious equilibrium between conservation imperatives and legitimate economic development aspirations.
We should protect the environment but also allow business.
Environmental and economic goals need to be balanced.

questionText: Você quer refutar um argumento contrário à ação climática usando raciocínio sofisticado. Como procederia?
correctAnswer: The contention that climate action impedes economic growth is empirically unsustainable, as burgeoning evidence demonstrates positive correlations between environmental investment and economic vitality.
options: Climate action doesn't hurt the economy.

The contention that climate action impedes economic growth is empirically unsustainable, as burgeoning evidence demonstrates positive correlations between environmental investment and economic vitality.
Climate action is good for the economy.
Environmental policies help business.

questionText: Em um workshop sobre consumo sustentável, você quer problematizar suposições convencionais. Como faz?
correctAnswer: It is worth interrogating whether incremental consumer behavior modifications can substantively address the systemic overproduction endemic to contemporary consumption paradigms.
options: Can individual shopping changes really help the environment?
It is worth interrogating whether incremental consumer behavior modifications can substantively address the systemic overproduction endemic to contemporary consumption paradigms.
Do people's shopping habits really make a difference?
Individual choices might not be enough to solve consumption problems.

questionText: Você deseja propor um marco teórico diferente para pensar sobre restauração ambiental. Como articula?
correctAnswer: Reconceptualizing environmental restoration through an integrative socio-ecological lens might facilitate more holistic and enduring interventions.
options: We should think about environmental restoration differently.
Reconceptualizing environmental restoration through an integrative socio-ecological lens might facilitate more holistic and enduring interventions.
Environmental restoration needs to consider both nature and people.
A new way of thinking about environmental restoration could help.

questionText: Durante uma audiência pública sobre impacto ambiental, você quer expressar validação enquanto mantém crítica. Como procede?
correctAnswer: The environmental assessment demonstrates commendable comprehensiveness; nevertheless, the mitigation strategies insufficiently address cumulative and synergistic impacts.
options: This assessment is good but not perfect.
The environmental assessment demonstrates commendable comprehensiveness; nevertheless, the mitigation strategies insufficiently address cumulative and synergistic impacts.
You did a thorough job, but you missed some things.
The study is detailed, but the solutions aren't complete.

questionText: Você quer destacar a interconexão entre múltiplos desafios ambientais durante uma apresentação. Qual expressão é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Environmental challenges are fundamentally interconnected, rendering isolated sectoral solutions inevitably inadequate and necessitating integrated transdisciplinary approaches.
options: Environmental problems are connected to each other.
Environmental challenges are fundamentally interconnected, rendering isolated sectoral solutions inevitably inadequate and necessitating integrated transdisciplinary approaches.
All environmental problems are related.
We need to solve all environmental problems together.

questionText: Em uma negociação multilateral sobre mudanças climáticas, você quer expressar cautela diplomática sobre compromissos. Como faz?
correctAnswer: While the proposed accord demonstrates considerable ambition, its enforceability mechanisms remain considerably nebulous, warranting supplementary clarification.
options: This agreement is not clear enough.
While the proposed accord demonstrates considerable ambition, its enforceability mechanisms remain considerably nebulous, warranting supplementary clarification.
We need to know more about how this will work.
The agreement is good, but we need clearer rules.

questionText: Você deseja argumentar pela primazia de questões ambientais em tomadas de decisão corporativa. Como se expressa?
correctAnswer: Given the existential trajectory of environmental degradation, organizational decision-making architectures necessitate substantive reorientation towards environmental imperatives.
options: Companies should care more about the environment.
Given the existential trajectory of environmental degradation, organizational decision-making architectures necessitate substantive reorientation towards environmental imperatives.
Businesses need to make the environment a priority.
Companies should put environmental concerns first.

questionText: Durante um seminário sobre adaptação climática, você quer questionar a suficiência das abordagens atuais. Como procede?
correctAnswer: The preponderance of contemporary adaptation frameworks predominantly emphasize incremental resilience-building, potentially obscuring the necessity for transformative systemic restructuring.
options: Our adaptation strategies might not be enough.
The preponderance of contemporary adaptation frameworks predominantly emphasize incremental resilience-building, potentially obscuring the necessity for transformative systemic restructuring.
We're making small changes but need big changes.
Current adaptation plans may be too limited in scope.

questionText: Você quer articular a complexidade de trade-offs entre conservação e desenvolvimento de forma nuançada. Como faz?
correctAnswer: The dichotomous framing of conservation versus development obscures more nuanced possibilities for achieving coevolutionary pathways that simultaneously advance ecological and human wellbeing.
options: We can find ways to protect the environment and develop.
The dichotomous framing of conservation versus development obscures more nuanced possibilities for achieving coevolutionary pathways that simultaneously advance ecological and human wellbeing.
There are ways to have both conservation and development.
We shouldn't think of conservation and development as opposites.

questionText: Em um fórum acadêmico, você quer problematizar pressupostos sobre sustentabilidade corporativa. Qual abordagem é adequada?
correctAnswer: Corporate sustainability discourse frequently obfuscates underlying structural imperatives that precipitate environmental externalization, potentially perpetuating greenwashing rather than substantive remediation.
options: Companies say they're sustainable but aren't really.

Corporate sustainability discourse frequently obfuscates underlying structural imperatives that precipitate environmental externalization, potentially perpetuating greenwashing rather than substantive remediation.
Corporate sustainability is often just marketing.
Many companies claim sustainability without real change.

questionText: Você deseja argumentar que soluções tecnológicas isoladas são insuficientes para desafios ambientais. Como articula?
correctAnswer: Whilst technological innovation is undoubtedly necessary, its sufficiency is profoundly circumscribed absent concomitant transformations in socioeconomic structures and consumption paradigms.
options: Technology alone won't solve environmental problems.
Whilst technological innovation is undoubtedly necessary, its sufficiency is profoundly circumscribed absent concomitant transformations in socioeconomic structures and consumption paradigms.
We need technology and social change to fix the environment.
Technology is important but not enough by itself.

questionText: Durante uma conferência sobre justiça climática, você quer articular responsabilidades diferenciadas de forma sofisticada. Como faz?
correctAnswer: Climate justice imperatively demands recognition of differentiated historical responsibilities and asymmetrical capacities for remediation among nations and social strata.
options: Rich countries caused more climate change.
Climate justice imperatively demands recognition of differentiated historical responsibilities and asymmetrical capacities for remediation among nations and social strata.
Some countries are more responsible for climate change.
Developed nations should do more about climate change.

questionText: Você quer questionar a narrativa do crescimento econômico verde durante um debate econômico. Como procede?
correctAnswer: The proposition that 'green growth' can decouple economic expansion from material throughput remains theoretically contentious and empirically unsubstantiated at requisite scales.
options: Green growth might not be real.
The proposition that 'green growth' can decouple economic expansion from material throughput remains theoretically contentious and empirically unsubstantiated at requisite scales.
We're not sure if green growth can work.
Economic growth might still harm the environment.

questionText: Em um workshop sobre transformação ecológica, você quer destacar a necessidade de repensar conceitos fundamentais. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: Substantive ecological transformation necessitates not merely policy adjustments but rather foundational epistemological reorientation regarding humanity's ontological relationship with non-human nature.
options: We need to change how we think about nature.

Substantive ecological transformation necessitates not merely policy adjustments but rather foundational epistemological reorientation regarding humanity's ontological relationship with non-human nature.
We should think about humans and nature differently.
Environmental change requires new ways of thinking about our place in nature.

questionText: Você quer articular a inadequação de métricas convencionais de progresso ambiental. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: Contemporary sustainability metrics frequently privilege quantifiable economic indicators whilst systematically marginalizing qualitative dimensions of ecological integrity and planetary biocapacity constraints.
options: How we measure progress is not good enough.

Contemporary sustainability metrics frequently privilege quantifiable economic indicators whilst systematically marginalizing qualitative dimensions of ecological integrity and planetary biocapacity constraints.
We measure sustainability the wrong way.
Economic measures don't show real environmental progress.

questionText: Durante uma discussão sobre economia ambiental, você quer demonstrar conhecimento crítico sobre internalização de externalidades. Como faz?
correctAnswer: Whilst environmental cost internalization mechanisms represent theoretical progress, their practical implementation remains constrained by methodological incommensurability and distributional contestation.
options: Pricing environmental costs is complicated.

Whilst environmental cost internalization mechanisms represent theoretical progress, their practical implementation remains constrained by methodological incommensurability and distributional contestation.
It's hard to price the environment correctly.
Putting a price on nature doesn't work well.

questionText: Você deseja articular que impactos ambientais transcendem marcos temporais convencionais. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: Environmental degradation perpetuates intergenerational injustices, engendering obligations that substantially transcend conventional temporal horizons of policy deliberation.
options: Environmental damage affects future generations.
Environmental degradation perpetuates intergenerational injustices, engendering obligations that substantially transcend conventional temporal horizons of policy deliberation.
We need to think about how our actions affect the future.
Current environmental damage will hurt people in the future.

questionText: Em um painel de liderança sobre transição energética, você quer questionar a inevitabilidade das estruturas existentes. Como procede?
correctAnswer: The entrenchment of incumbent energy infrastructure should not be construed as inevitable; rather, it reflects contingent power configurations susceptible to deliberate contestation and reorganization.
options: We can change how we produce energy.

The entrenchment of incumbent energy infrastructure should not be construed as inevitable; rather, it reflects contingent power configurations susceptible to deliberate contestation and reorganization.
The current energy system isn't permanent.
We have the power to change our energy systems.

questionText: Você quer integrar perspectivas múltiplas sobre conhecimento ambiental durante uma discussão acadêmica. Como faz?
correctAnswer: Integrating indigenous epistemologies with scientific frameworks may illuminate previously obscured dimensions of ecological resilience and adaptive capacity.
options: Indigenous knowledge about nature is important too.
Integrating indigenous epistemologies with scientific frameworks may illuminate previously obscured dimensions of ecological resilience and adaptive capacity.
We should combine different ways of knowing about the environment.
Traditional knowledge and science together help us understand nature better.

questionText: Durante um fórum sobre governança ambiental, você quer demonstrar compreensão de paradoxos estruturais. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: Environmental governance operates within paradoxical configurations wherein regulatory mechanisms designed to remediate environmental degradation often inadvertently reinforce the capital accumulation processes precipitating such degradation.
options: Environmental rules sometimes don't really help.

Environmental governance operates within paradoxical configurations wherein regulatory mechanisms designed to remediate environmental degradation often inadvertently reinforce the capital accumulation processes precipitating such degradation.
Environmental laws can make problems worse.
Sometimes environmental policies support the systems causing the damage.

questionText: Você quer sugerir que a linguagem comum sobre sustentabilidade obscurece desacordos fundamentais. Qual abordagem é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: The deceptive semantic consensus surrounding 'sustainability' frequently masks irreconcilable divergences regarding ontological assumptions and normative commitments concerning human-environment relations.
options: People disagree about what sustainability means.

The deceptive semantic consensus surrounding 'sustainability' frequently masks irreconcilable divergences regarding ontological assumptions and normative commitments concerning human-environment relations.
Everyone talks about sustainability but wants different things.
The word 'sustainability' hides real disagreements.

questionText: Em uma discussão sobre limites planetários, você quer comunicar urgência sem determinismo. Como procede?
correctAnswer: Whilst planetary boundaries constitute non-negotiable biophysical constraints, the particular pathways through which humanity navigates these limitations remain contingent upon deliberative choice and institutional innovation.
options: We have limited resources but choices to make.

Whilst planetary boundaries constitute non-negotiable biophysical constraints, the particular pathways through which humanity navigates these limitations remain contingent upon deliberative choice and institutional innovation.
The environment has limits but we can choose how to deal with them.
Nature has boundaries, but how we respond is up to us.

questionText: Você deseja problematizar a categoria de 'desenvolvimento sustentável' durante um seminário de política. Como expressa?
correctAnswer: The conceptual framework of 'sustainable development' potentially conflates incommensurable objectives, rendering coherent operationalization contingent upon explicit negotiation of fundamental priorities and distributional trade-offs.
options: Sustainable development has conflicting goals.

The conceptual framework of 'sustainable development' potentially conflates incommensurable objectives, rendering coherent operationalization contingent upon explicit negotiation of fundamental priorities and distributional trade-offs.
Sustainable development is hard to define because it wants too many things.
The idea of sustainable development has contradictions in it.
